PortfolioSettings.title: PortfolioSettings
PortfolioSettings.description: The complete customizable settings and content details for Grace Shuuya's portfolio website.

bio.description: Biography description rendered on the homepage introduction card.

profilePhoto.description: The URL of the primary profile photo.

socials.description: Social media URL mappings for LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, Freelance Instagram, and GitHub.

jesusUnite.description: Content description and invitation links for the Jesus Unites section.

testimonials.description: List of user-provided testimonials, containing company/person name, handle/website, review message, and avatar image URL.

portfolioItems.description: Dynamic portfolio items categorised under graphic, video, and ui sections.

rates.description: Service categories and pricing packages structure.

/settings/{settingsId}.description: Stores global app settings documents, specifically 'portfolio' representing all dynamic settings.
